title: Pool import, automatic distribution and investor alerts go live
content_html:
Fund admins have been stuck with spreadsheet workflows for years. As of today, the most painful ones are gone from Cryptool.

For fund admins:

  • One-click import of past investments from spreadsheets or competitor platforms
  • Instant distribution to every member or any selected subset
  • Automatic pool-to-user linking, by email or by signed wallet

For investors and users:

  • Update the distribution wallet per pool or per chain in one click
  • Track every distribution from a single dashboard
  • Full visibility into when, what and how much arrives

This is a first in the industry: free to use, accessible to everyone, and built to replace the spreadsheet workflows that fund admins have been stuck with for years.
author: Cryptool
